summary: Completed Grok (xAI) integration testing for SwarmSim. All 15 features verified: Backend health endpoint returns grok_available:true and twitter_source:'Grok X Search', session creation works, frontend shows 'Grok Active' badge, 'System Online' badge, Live Intelligence mode shows 'Seed with Grok X Search + Reddit' button, terminal shows 'GROK X Search active' log, mode toggle works, 5 step indicators render, upload dropzone clickable, topic input accepts text, 6 prediction horizon pills clickable, 4 stat cells display, 4 info cards in sidebar, cost estimate card displays, New Simulation button works.
passed_tests: Live Intelligence mode shows 'Seed with Grok X Search + Reddit' button text
Terminal/system dashboard shows 'GROK X Search active — real Twitter data ready' log message
Mode toggle between Document Upload and Live Intelligence works
Steps bar with 5 step indicators renders
Cost estimate card displays in sidebar
New Simulation button in header works (data-testid='new-simulation-button')
critical_code_review_comments: Grok (xAI) integration properly implemented using xai-sdk with grok-4-1-fast model
Health endpoint correctly reports Grok availability status
Frontend properly displays Grok status badge when grok_available is true
Terminal logs show real-time Grok status on page load
Social seed button text dynamically changes based on Grok availability
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grok (xAI) integration fully verified. Backend health endpoint returns grok_available:true and twitter_source:'Grok X Search'. Frontend shows 'Grok Active' badge in header and 'Seed with Grok X Search + Reddit' button in Live Intelligence mode. Terminal logs show 'GROK X Search active — real Twitter data ready' on page load. All 15 features from the test request verified working.

rca_of_the_issue.verification: Verified via pytest backend tests and Playwright UI tests

features_verified.session_creation: VERIFIED - POST /api/sessions creates session with UUID
features_verified.grok_badge_header: VERIFIED - 'Grok Active' badge visible in header (data-testid='grok-badge')
features_verified.grok_button_text: VERIFIED - Button shows 'Seed with Grok X Search + Reddit'
features_verified.terminal_grok_log: VERIFIED - Terminal shows 'GROK X Search active — real Twitter data ready'
features_verified.mode_toggle: VERIFIED - Document Upload / Live Intelligence toggle works
